request.description:
Signin
* **openApiKey** - parameter which can be taken from Company settings
* **pin** - pin code of the employee 
* **password** - password of the employee

* **limit** (numerical value, 20 as default) allows you to set the number of objects returned in one page. 
* **offset** (numerical value, 0 as default) allows you to specify the ranking number of the first item on the page.
* **sort** (default value "id", also it's possible to sort by "created") allows you to sort records according to selected value
* **order** (default value "asc") allows you to order records in increasing or decreasing order 
* **type** (numerical value) - customer type id of the customers
* **status** (numerical value) - allows you to filter customers according to theirs status (e.g. 1 - active, 2 - deleted)
* **ids** (array) - list of the specific customers divided by comma
* **createdAfter** and **createdBefore** (numerical) time parameters which can be used separately or as time interval from/to

* **countryPhoneCode** (numerical value) - required, integer only
* **firstName** (string) - max length 128, should consist of characters and digits only
* **email** (string) - unique email
* **phone** (numerical) - unique phone, 6-12 digits
* **locationId** (numerical value) - sales outlet id
* **billingAddress** (object) - allows to specify the billing address. 
 {addressLine1, city, country, postalCode} are required fields
* **deliveryAddress** (object) - allows to specify the delivery address.
 {addressLine1, city, country, postalCode} are required fields
* **customerId** (numerical value) - required, min value = 1

* **limit** (numerical value, 20 as default) allows you to set the number of objects returned in one page. 
* **offset** (numerical value, 0 as default) allows you to specify the ranking number of the first item on the page.
* **order** (default value "asc") allows you to order records in increasing or decreasing order 
* **customerId** (numerical value, min value => 1, *optional*)
* **id** (default value *null*) - allows you to search sales via id or offline sale id (partial match)
* **status** allows you to request sales according their status (e.g. completed sales/suspended sales)
* **timeFrom** and **timeTo** (numerical) time parameters which can be used as time interval from/to

request.description:
* **customerId** (numerical value) - required, min value = 1
* **mailingList** (numerical value)- (e.g. 0 - deny, 1 - allow)
* **trackLoyaltyPoints** (numerical value)- (e.g. 0 - deny, 1 - allow)
* **locationId** (numerical value) - sales outlet id
* **billingAddress** (object) - allows to specify the billing address. 
 {addressLine1, city, country, postalCode} are required fields
* **deliveryAddress** (object) - allows to specify the delivery address.
 {addressLine1, city, country, postalCode} are required fields
* **customerId** (numerical value) - required, min value = 1

* **customerId** (numerical value) - required, min value = 1
* **storeCredit** (numerical value) - optional
* **pointsBalance** (numerical value) - optional

**Request body:**

* **limit** (numerical value, 100 as default) allows you to set the number of objects returned in one page. 
* **offset** (numerical value, 0 as default) allows you to specify the ranking number of the first item on the page.
* **sort** (default value "id", allow: "id", "created") allows you to sort records according to selected value
* **order** (default value "asc", allow: "asc", "desc") allows you to order records in increasing or decreasing order
* **status** (numerical value, *optional*) - allows you to filter sales according to theirs status: 1 - completed, 2 - suspended
* **customerId** (numerical value, *optional*) allows you to filter sales by customer
* **employeeId** (numerical value, *optional*) allows you to filter sales by employee
* **timeFrom** and **timeTo** (numerical, *optional*) allows you to filter sales by time interval from/to
* **timeUpdatedFrom** (numerical, *optional*) allows you to filter sales by updated time 
* **salesOutletIds** (array, *optional*) allows you to filter sales by sales outlets
* **ids** (array, *optional*) allows you to filter sales by ids

request.description:
* **barcode** (numerical value, required) allows you to set the barcode for the gift card. 
* **balance** (numerical value, optional) allows you to specify the amount for the gift card.
* **type**    (numerical value, optional, default value set to DEFAULT). Available types [0: DEFAULT, 1: MERCURY, 2: SHIFT4]

* **limit** (numerical value, 20 as default) allows you to set the number of objects returned in one page. 
* **offset** (numerical value, 0 as default) allows you to specify the ranking number of the first item on the page.
* **barcodes** (array, optional) list of the specific barcodes, divided by comma
* **types**   (array, optional) list of the available types [0: DEFAULT, 1: MERCURY, 2: SHIFT4], divided by comma

Returns list of notes by specific product.

- **productId** Required. (numerical value) product unique identifier.

* **locale** Required. (text value) note language, available values are ['en', 'fr', 'es', 'ru'].
* **title** Required. (text value) short note title, maximum length 200 chars
* **text** Required. (text value) note text, maximum length 4000 chars
